title: Table of content file schema
description: Diplodoc table of contents file (toc.yaml). Defines the structure, navigation, and metadata of the documentation project.

title.description: string. Title of the documentation project or section. Displayed in the browser tab and navigation header.
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** Title of the documentation project or section. Displayed in the browser tab and navigation header.

href.description: string (uri). URL of the documentation root. Used when the TOC is embedded or linked externally.
href.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** URL of the documentation root. Used when the TOC is embedded or linked externally.

stage.description: string. Publication stage of the entire TOC. Controls visibility during build.
stage.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Publication stage of the entire TOC. Controls visibility during build.

Examples: `new`, `preview`, `tech-preview`, `skip`.

base.description: string. Base path prefix prepended to all relative hrefs in this TOC.
base.markdownDescription: **`string`** Base path prefix prepended to all relative hrefs in this TOC.

singlePage.description: boolean. Generate a single-page HTML variant that combines all TOC items into one page.
singlePage.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Generate a single-page HTML variant that combines all TOC items into one page.

oneOf.description: TocLabel[]. Array of label badges shown next to the TOC title.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`TocLabel[]`** Array of label badges shown next to the TOC title.

oneOf.description: TocLabel. Single label badge shown next to the TOC title.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`TocLabel`** Single label badge shown next to the TOC title.

label.description: TocLabel | TocLabel[]. Label badge(s) displayed next to the TOC title in the navigation sidebar.
label.markdownDescription: **`TocLabel | TocLabel[]`** Label badge(s) displayed next to the TOC title in the navigation sidebar.

when.description: string | boolean. Condition expression for including this TOC in the build.
when.markdownDescription:
**`string | boolean`** Condition expression for including this TOC in the build.

Example: `'env == "production"'`.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable the top navigation bar.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the top navigation bar.

oneOf.description: string. Path to an external navigation config file.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to an external navigation config file.

navigation.description: boolean | string | Navigation. Top navigation bar configuration.
navigation.markdownDescription: **`boolean | string | Navigation`** Top navigation bar configuration. Can be a boolean toggle, a path to an external config, or an inline `Navigation` object.

pdf.description: object. PDF output configuration for this TOC.
pdf.markdownDescription: **`object`** PDF output configuration for this TOC.

startPages.description: string[]. Paths to pages inserted at the beginning of the PDF (e.g. cover page, preface).
startPages.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** Paths to pages inserted at the beginning of the PDF.

Examples: cover page, preface.

endPages.description: string[]. Paths to pages appended at the end of the PDF (e.g. appendix, legal notice).
endPages.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** Paths to pages appended at the end of the PDF.

Examples: appendix, legal notice.

items.description: TocItem[]. Top-level list of TOC items defining the documentation structure.
items.markdownDescription: **`TocItem[]`** Top-level list of TOC items defining the documentation structure.

TocLabel.title: TOC label badge
TocLabel.description: A badge label displayed next to a TOC item or section title.
TocLabel.markdownDescription: A badge label displayed next to a TOC item or section title.

title.description: string. Text displayed on the label badge.
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** Text displayed on the label badge.

description.description: string. Tooltip text shown when hovering over the label badge.
description.markdownDescription: **`string`** Tooltip text shown when hovering over the label badge.

theme.description: string (enum). Visual color theme of the label badge.
theme.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Visual color theme of the label badge.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `normal` | Default grey |
| `info` | Blue |
| `danger` | Red |
| `warning` | Orange |
| `success` | Green |
| `utility` | Purple |
| `unknown` | Grey (unknown state) |
| `clear` | Transparent |

when.description: string | boolean. Condition expression for showing this label.
when.markdownDescription:
**`string | boolean`** Condition expression for showing this label.

Example: `'version == "2.0"'`.

TocItems.title: TOC items list
TocItems.description: TocItem[]. An ordered list of TOC items (pages, sections, or includes).
TocItems.markdownDescription: **`TocItem[]`** An ordered list of TOC items (pages, sections, or includes).

TocItem.title: TOC item
TocItem.description: object. A single entry in the table of contents. Must have at least one of: href, include, or items.
TocItem.markdownDescription:
**`object`** A single entry in the table of contents.

Must have at least one of:
- `href` — page link
- `include` — external TOC
- `items` — section with children

name.description: string. Display name of this item in the navigation sidebar.
name.markdownDescription: **`string`** Display name of this item in the navigation sidebar.

expanded.description: boolean. Whether this section is expanded by default in the sidebar. Only applies to items with children.
expanded.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Whether this section is expanded by default in the sidebar.

Only applies to items with `items` (sections).

labeled.description: boolean. Whether to show the label badge for this item.
labeled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Whether to show the label badge for this item.

hidden.description: boolean. Hide this item from the navigation sidebar. The page is still built and accessible via direct URL.
hidden.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Hide this item from the navigation sidebar.

The page is still built and accessible via direct URL.

oneOf.description: string. Single role or group that can access this item.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Single role or group that can access this item.

oneOf.description: string[]. List of roles or groups that can access this item.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** List of roles or groups that can access this item.

restricted-access.description: string | string[]. Access control: role name(s) or group(s) allowed to view this item.
restricted-access.markdownDescription: **`string | string[]`** Access control: role name(s) or group(s) allowed to view this item.

when.description: string | boolean. Condition expression for including this item in the build.
when.markdownDescription:
**`string | boolean`** Condition expression for including this item in the build.

Example: `'env != "internal"'`.

items.description: TocItem[]. Child items for creating a nested section.
items.markdownDescription: **`TocItem[]`** Child items for creating a nested section.

href.description: string. Relative path to the Markdown file for this page (e.g. 'quickstart.md') or an external URL.
href.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Relative path to the Markdown file for this page or an external URL.

Example: `quickstart.md`, `https://example.com`.

include.description: Include. Include an external TOC or content source into this position.
include.markdownDescription: **`Include`** Include an external TOC or content source into this position.

Include.title: Include directive
Include.description: object. Includes an external TOC file or content source into the current TOC position.
Include.markdownDescription: **`object`** Includes an external TOC file or content source into the current TOC position.

mode.description: string (enum). Include mode controlling how the external TOC is merged.
mode.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Include mode controlling how the external TOC is merged.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `link` | Keep as a separate TOC with its own base path |
| `merge` | Merge items into the current TOC |
| `root_merge` | Merge items at the root level |

path.description: string. Relative path to the external toc.yaml file to include.
path.markdownDescription: **`string`** Relative path to the external `toc.yaml` file to include.

includers.description: Includer[]. List of includer plugins that transform content before including.
includers.markdownDescription:
**`Includer[]`** List of includer plugins that transform content before including.

Common names: `openapi`, `generic`, `unarchive`.

Includer.title: Includer plugin
Includer.description: object. A plugin that transforms or generates TOC content before it is included.
Includer.markdownDescription:
**`object`** A plugin that transforms or generates TOC content before it is included.

Common names: `openapi`, `generic`, `unarchive`.

OpenApiIncluder.title: OpenAPI includer configuration
OpenApiIncluder.description: object. Configuration for the 'openapi' includer plugin that generates TOC from an OpenAPI spec.
OpenApiIncluder.markdownDescription: **`object`** Configuration for the `openapi` includer plugin that generates TOC from an OpenAPI spec.

input.description: string. Path to the OpenAPI specification file (JSON or YAML).
input.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to the OpenAPI specification file (JSON or YAML).

filter.description: OpenApiIncluderFilter. Filter which endpoints or tags to include in the generated TOC.
filter.markdownDescription: **`OpenApiIncluderFilter`** Filter which endpoints or tags to include in the generated TOC.

noindex.description: OpenApiIncluderFilter. Filter for endpoints or tags to exclude from search indexing.
noindex.markdownDescription: **`OpenApiIncluderFilter`** Filter for endpoints or tags to exclude from search indexing.

hidden.description: OpenApiIncluderFilter. Filter for endpoints or tags to hide from the navigation sidebar.
hidden.markdownDescription: **`OpenApiIncluderFilter`** Filter for endpoints or tags to hide from the navigation sidebar.

tabName.description: string. Display name for the API sandbox tab.
tabName.markdownDescription: **`string`** Display name for the API sandbox tab.

host.description: string (uri). Base URL for the API sandbox try-it-out requests.
host.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** Base URL for the API sandbox try-it-out requests.

leadingPage.description: object. Configuration for the auto-generated leading (overview) page of the API reference.
leadingPage.markdownDescription: **`object`** Configuration for the auto-generated leading (overview) page of the API reference.

name.description: string. Display name for the leading overview page.
name.markdownDescription: **`string`** Display name for the leading overview page.

mode.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Page mode.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `section` | Acts as a section header with children |
| `leaf` | Standalone page without children |

spec.description: object. OpenAPI spec rendering options on the leading page.
spec.markdownDescription: **`object`** OpenAPI spec rendering options on the leading page.

renderMode.description: string (enum). How to render the OpenAPI spec on the leading page.
renderMode.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** How to render the OpenAPI spec on the leading page.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `inline` | Render spec inline on the page |
| `hidden` | Do not render spec |

tags.description: Record<string, OpenApiCustomTag>. Per-tag customization. Keys are OpenAPI tag names.
tags.markdownDescription: **`Record<string, OpenApiCustomTag>`** Per-tag customization. Keys are OpenAPI tag names, values are custom tag configurations.

OpenApiCustomTag.title: OpenAPI custom tag
OpenApiCustomTag.description: object. Customization options for a specific OpenAPI tag in the generated TOC.
OpenApiCustomTag.markdownDescription: **`object`** Customization options for a specific OpenAPI tag in the generated TOC.

hidden.description: boolean. Hide all endpoints under this tag from the navigation sidebar.
hidden.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Hide all endpoints under this tag from the navigation sidebar.

name.description: string. Override the display name for this tag in the navigation.
name.markdownDescription: **`string`** Override the display name for this tag in the navigation.

path.description: string. Override the output path for pages generated from this tag.
path.markdownDescription: **`string`** Override the output path for pages generated from this tag.

alias.description: string. Alias for this tag used in URL generation.
alias.markdownDescription: **`string`** Alias for this tag used in URL generation.

OpenApiIncluderFilter.title: OpenAPI includer filter
OpenApiIncluderFilter.description: object. Filter for selecting specific OpenAPI endpoints or tags.
OpenApiIncluderFilter.markdownDescription: **`object`** Filter for selecting specific OpenAPI endpoints or tags.

endpoint.description: string. Filter by endpoint path pattern.
endpoint.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Filter by endpoint path pattern.

Example: `/api/v1/users`.

tag.description: string. Filter by OpenAPI tag name.
tag.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Filter by OpenAPI tag name.

Example: `Authentication`.

Navigation.title: Navigation bar configuration
Navigation.description: object. Top navigation bar configuration with logo and header items.
Navigation.markdownDescription: **`object`** Top navigation bar configuration with logo and header items.

logo.description: NavigationLogo. Logo displayed in the navigation bar.
logo.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLogo`** Logo displayed in the navigation bar.

header.description: NavigationHeader. Header navigation items (links, buttons, dropdowns, controls).
header.markdownDescription: **`NavigationHeader`** Header navigation items (links, buttons, dropdowns, controls).

NavigationLogo.title: Navigation logo
NavigationLogo.description: object. Logo configuration for the navigation bar. Supports light/dark theme variants.
NavigationLogo.markdownDescription: **`object`** Logo configuration for the navigation bar. Supports light/dark theme variants.

text.description: string. Text label displayed next to the logo image.
text.markdownDescription: **`string`** Text label displayed next to the logo image.

url.description: string (uri). URL the logo links to when clicked.
url.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** URL the logo links to when clicked.

urlTitle.description: string. Accessible title (aria-label) for the logo link.
urlTitle.markdownDescription: **`string`** Accessible title (`aria-label`) for the logo link.

icon.description: string (uri). URL or path to the logo image file.
icon.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** URL or path to the logo image file.

dark.description: NavigationLogo. Logo configuration override for dark theme.
dark.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLogo`** Logo configuration override for dark theme.

light.description: NavigationLogo. Logo configuration override for light theme.
light.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLogo`** Logo configuration override for light theme.

NavigationHeader.title: Navigation header
NavigationHeader.description: object. Configuration for left and right navigation header item groups.
NavigationHeader.markdownDescription: **`object`** Configuration for left and right navigation header item groups.

leftItems.description: NavigationItem[]. Navigation items aligned to the left side of the header.
leftItems.markdownDescription: **`NavigationItem[]`** Navigation items aligned to the left side of the header.

rightItems.description: NavigationItem[]. Navigation items aligned to the right side of the header.
rightItems.markdownDescription: **`NavigationItem[]`** Navigation items aligned to the right side of the header.

iconSize.description: number. Default icon size in pixels for all items in this header.
iconSize.markdownDescription: **`number`** Default icon size in pixels for all items in this header.

NavigationItems.title: Navigation items list
NavigationItems.description: NavigationItem[]. An ordered list of navigation bar items.
NavigationItems.markdownDescription: **`NavigationItem[]`** An ordered list of navigation bar items.

NavigationItem.title: Navigation item
NavigationItem.description: object. A single navigation bar item. Must have a 'type' field: 'link', 'button', 'dropdown', or 'controls'.
NavigationItem.markdownDescription:
**`object`** A single navigation bar item. Must have a `type` field.

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `link` | Plain text link |
| `button` | Styled button |
| `dropdown` | Dropdown menu |
| `controls` | Theme/language switcher |

type.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Item type.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `link` | Plain text link |
| `button` | Styled button |
| `dropdown` | Dropdown menu |
| `controls` | Theme/language switcher controls |

NavigationBaseItem.title: Navigation base item
NavigationBaseItem.description: object. Common fields shared by all navigation item types.
NavigationBaseItem.markdownDescription: **`object`** Common fields shared by all navigation item types.

text.description: string. Display text label for the navigation item.
text.markdownDescription: **`string`** Display text label for the navigation item.

url.description: string (uri). URL the navigation item links to.
url.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** URL the navigation item links to.

icon.description: string (uri). URL or path to the icon image displayed alongside the text.
icon.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** URL or path to the icon image displayed alongside the text.

iconSize.description: number. Icon size in pixels. Overrides the header-level iconSize.
iconSize.markdownDescription: **`number`** Icon size in pixels. Overrides the header-level `iconSize`.

when.description: string | boolean. Condition expression for showing this navigation item.
when.markdownDescription:
**`string | boolean`** Condition expression for showing this navigation item.

Example: `'lang == "en"'`.

NavigationLinkItem.title: Navigation link item
NavigationLinkItem.description: object. A plain text navigation link. Requires type='link' and a text label.
NavigationLinkItem.markdownDescription:
**`object`** A plain text navigation link.

Required: `type: link`, `text`.

text.description: string. Display text for the link.

target.description: NavigationLinkTarget. Browser target for opening the link.
target.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLinkTarget`** Browser target for opening the link.

arrow.description: boolean. Show an arrow icon after the link text to indicate external navigation.
arrow.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show an arrow icon after the link text to indicate external navigation.

NavigationButtonItem.title: Navigation button item
NavigationButtonItem.description: object. A styled call-to-action button. Requires type='button', text, and url.
NavigationButtonItem.markdownDescription:
**`object`** A styled call-to-action button.

Required: `type: button`, `text`, `url`.

urlTitle.description: string. Accessible title (aria-label) for the button link.
urlTitle.markdownDescription: **`string`** Accessible title (`aria-label`) for the button link.

primary.description: boolean. Render the button with a primary (accent) visual style.
primary.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Render the button with a primary (accent) visual style.

theme.description: string. Visual theme of the button.
theme.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Visual theme of the button.

Examples: `normal`, `action`, `outlined`, `flat`.

oneOf.description: string. URL or path to an image displayed inside the button.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** URL or path to an image displayed inside the button.

data.description: string. URL or path to the image file.
data.markdownDescription: **`string`** URL or path to the image file.

position.description: string (enum). Position of the image relative to the button text.
position.markdownDescription: **`string (enum)`** Position of the image relative to the button text: `left` or `right`.

alt.description: string. Alternative text for the image (accessibility).

oneOf.description: object. Image configuration with position and alt text.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** Image configuration with position and alt text.

img.description: string | object. Image displayed inside the button.
img.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** Image displayed inside the button. String shorthand or full configuration object.

oneOf.description: NavigationAnalyticsEvent. Single analytics event fired on button click.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`NavigationAnalyticsEvent`** Single analytics event fired on button click.

oneOf.description: NavigationAnalyticsEvent[]. Multiple analytics events fired on button click.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`NavigationAnalyticsEvent[]`** Multiple analytics events fired on button click.

analyticsEvents.description: NavigationAnalyticsEvent | NavigationAnalyticsEvent[]. Analytics event(s) to fire when the button is clicked.
analyticsEvents.markdownDescription: **`NavigationAnalyticsEvent | NavigationAnalyticsEvent[]`** Analytics event(s) to fire when the button is clicked.

target.description: NavigationLinkTarget. Browser target for opening the button link.
target.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLinkTarget`** Browser target for opening the button link.

width.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Button width.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `auto` | Fit content |
| `max` | Stretch to available width |

NavigationDropdownItem.title: Navigation dropdown item
NavigationDropdownItem.description: object. A dropdown menu containing multiple links. Requires type='dropdown' and items.
NavigationDropdownItem.markdownDescription:
**`object`** A dropdown menu containing multiple links.

Required: `type: dropdown`, `items`.

items.description: NavigationLinkItem[]. List of link items shown in the dropdown menu.
items.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLinkItem[]`** List of link items shown in the dropdown menu.

NavigationControlsItem.title: Navigation controls item
NavigationControlsItem.description: object. Built-in UI controls (theme/language switcher). Requires type='controls'.
NavigationControlsItem.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Built-in UI controls (theme/language switcher).

Required: `type: controls`.

NavigationLinkTarget.title: Link target
NavigationLinkTarget.description: string (enum). HTML anchor target attribute controlling how the link opens.
NavigationLinkTarget.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** HTML anchor target attribute controlling how the link opens.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `_self` | Current browsing context (default) |
| `_blank` | New tab or window |
| `_parent` | Parent browsing context |
| `_top` | Top-level browsing context |

NavigationAnalyticsEvent.title: Analytics event
NavigationAnalyticsEvent.description: object. An analytics event definition sent to configured analytics providers on user interaction.
NavigationAnalyticsEvent.markdownDescription: **`object`** An analytics event definition sent to configured analytics providers on user interaction.

name.description: string. Event name sent to the analytics provider.
name.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Event name sent to the analytics provider.

Example: `header_cta_click`.

type.description: string. Event type or category used for grouping in analytics dashboards.
type.markdownDescription: **`string`** Event type or category used for grouping in analytics dashboards.

include.description: string[]. List of analytics counter IDs to send this event to.
include.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** List of analytics counter IDs to send this event to.

exclude.description: string[]. List of analytics counter IDs to exclude from receiving this event.
exclude.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** List of analytics counter IDs to exclude from receiving this event.

counters.description: object. Counter include/exclude lists for targeting specific analytics counters.
counters.markdownDescription: **`object`** Counter include/exclude lists for targeting specific analytics counters.

context.description: string. Additional context string attached to the event payload.
context.markdownDescription: **`string`** Additional context string attached to the event payload.
